command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.201 "bash -s" << 'OUTEREOF'

set -e
echo "=== Download cloudflared .deb ==="
cd /tmp
curl -sL -o cloudflared.deb https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64.deb
echo "downloaded: $(ls -la cloudflared.deb | awk '{print $5}') bytes"

echo "=== Install ==="
sudo dpkg -i cloudflared.deb 2>&1 | tail -2
cloudflared --version

echo "=== Install as service with SAME tunnel token (replica) ==="
sudo cloudflared service install eyJhIjoiZmZlMWQyZjg2NjFiYzM3MWQxMzhkNjE1ZTQzNGZiOGEiLCJ0IjoiZDU2YTI2OTEtNTk3NS00MmQ3LTg4ZmUtOTY0M2U1MGM1NTY5IiwicyI6Ill6RmpNVGs1WkRndE5UZzFPUzAwWTJVd0xXSmtaakl0TlRNMlpqazVZV1ZqTUdZNSJ9 2>&1 | tail -3

echo "=== Start and verify ==="
sudo systemctl enable cloudflared 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl start cloudflared
sleep 6
systemctl is-active cloudflared
echo "--- recent logs ---"
sudo journalctl -u cloudflared -n 12 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "registered|connection|tunnel|error" | tail -8

OUTEREOF
